title: Shampoo/Conditioner to use in between Cold Cap/Chemo Infusions
body:
Hi there! 

I read that if you use Aveeno ACV shampoo in between chemo treatments it helps. I also read using products containing castor oil and rosemary oil is counterproductive until chemo is over since those oils open up the hair follicles while cold capping tries to maintain them at current size to avoid extreme falling out. I’m either going to purchase Aveeno ACV Shampoo or Purador ACV Shampoo/conditioner Thin2Thick that has castor oil and other hair growth ingredients. Advice/thoughts?
